schema.name: Taxi Dubrovnik Airport to Pirovac

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Pirovac, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1040 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Pirovac from Dubrovnik Airport, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Dubrovnik Airport to Pirovac is around 328 km and takes roughly 4 h 30 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Dubrovnik Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the arrivals hall, just after baggage reclaim, holding a sign with your name. I help with the luggage and walk you to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No problem. I track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup to the actual landing, with no extra charge for the wait.

mainEntity.name: How much is the transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Pirovac?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 520 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, tolls and luggage included. A return trip is 1040.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can plan around your flight. For a same-day pickup after a sudden change, call or WhatsApp me and I will help if I can.
